Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Subpoenas To Appear At Deposition And Production Of Business Records To Arch Insurance, Co. Or In The Protective Order
Off Calendar Jul-11-2013 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-30-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: kenneth b. mckenzie, esq., 925.935.3300, for plaintiff mitchell engineering company.
david l. ashby, esq., 650.691.2888, for defendant cmc traffic control specialists, inc. bda cmc construction.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANT CMC TRAFFIC CONTROL SPECIALISTS INC.'S, DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Overruled. Mitchell Engineering Company has pled sufficient facts to allege the causes of action for breach of contract and quantum meruit. The causes of action do not appear time-barred on the face of the Complaint. It cannot be determined at the pleading stage whether the Statute of Frauds applies. Both Mitchell Engineering Company and CMC Traffic Control Specialists, Inc. include additional facts in their moving and opposing papers that are outside of the allegations of the Complaint and not considered by the court. CMC Traffic's objections to the Jones Declaration are sustained. Defendant's request for judicial notice of the complaint is granted. The request for judicial notice of the Petition for Dissolution is denied; it is not referred to in the Complaint and is irrelevant. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.
